prose:
Method provenance

• Property: HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans orbital energy difference) of furan, in eV  
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting)  
• Geometry provenance: single-point calculation on the fixed Cartesian coordinates supplied in `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`; no geometry optimization was performed (notation: DFT//input xyz).  
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation).  
• Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet).  
• Software: PySCF (backend used by chemkit frontier-orbitals skill).  
• Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 9 cycles; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true; no warnings were returned by the engine.  

Result

HOMO = −6.3597638 eV  
LUMO = −0.1024036 eV  
⇒ HOMO–LUMO gap = **6.2573602 eV**

Reproducibility

• Command executed (from `cli_invocation`):  
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmph7rl6qgn/live.json`  
• Output JSON: `furan_frontier_b3lyp_def2tzvp.json` (contains all energies and orbital data).  
• Live engine log was streamed to a `frontier_<timestamp>.out` file in the working directory during the run; it records the full PySCF SCF transcript.

No engine warnings were issued; run completed normally.
